fixes.origin:
sql = f'SELECT username from USERS where password = \'{bar}\''
con = helpers.db_sqlite.get_connection()
cur = con.cursor()
cur.execute(sql)
fixes.replacement:
sql = "SELECT username from USERS where password = ?"
con = helpers.db_sqlite.get_connection()
cur = con.cursor()
cur.execute(sql, (bar,))

static_findings.message: Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "sql" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
static_findings.evidence: sql = f'SELECT username from USERS where password = \'{bar}\''
